reviews.comment:
Buena atención, variedad de comidas, baños muy limpios.

Good service, variety of food, very clean bathrooms.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlbU91WlRREAE

reviews.comment:
Buena atención por parte de los playeros. Esta en un buen punto justo a la salida de San Pedro. Los baños limpios. Lugar para estacionar y poder comprar tranquilo en el serví compras. Reciben todos los medios de pago, targetas, efectivo. Reciben serviclub de YPF.

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service from the attendants. It's in a great location right on the outskirts of San Pedro. The restrooms are clean. There's plenty of parking and you can shop at the convenience store with ease. They accept all forms of payment: cards and cash. They also accept YPF Serviclub payments.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNlNkwtUWRREAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena gente exelente atención muy cordiales todos baños muy limpios el lugar en si muy ordenado y limpio muy rica la cosina y sobretodo los playeros muy atentos siempre la verdad insuperables en todo muy recomendable.

(Translated by Google)
Very nice people, excellent service, very friendly, everyone's bathrooms were very clean, the place itself was very tidy and clean, the food was delicious, and above all, the staff were always very attentive, truly unbeatable in every way, highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNleUxhZ193RRAB

reviews.comment:
Carisimo. Un afanes. Un tostado 480 pesos y una fresh de manzana 180 pesos, un pastelito 320. Un asalto. Evitenlo

(Translated by Google)
Extremely expensive. A rip-off. A toasted sandwich is 480 pesos, an apple soda is 180 pesos, and a pastry is 320. It's highway robbery. Avoid it.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1dC1TTnR3RRAB

reviews.comment:
El cambio del concesionario no fue positivo. El lugar perdió mucho como lugar agradable. Se volvió carero, desangelado. Sobra personal pero el cliente no es bien atendido por el sistema ahora aplicado. Es limpio y solo eso. Anotar puntos en contra, como pasa siempre a lis socios del ACA, que no encuentran inspecciones que los defiendan para mantener lo que antes funcionaba

(Translated by Google)
The change in dealership wasn't positive. The place lost much of its pleasant feel. It became expensive and uninviting. There are too many staff, but the customer isn't well served by the new system. It's clean, and that's about it. Points against it, as always happens to ACA members, who can't find inspections to protect them from maintaining what used to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/16093166206795082767/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR1bC11X293RRAB
